message:
Add reqwest query feature and fix minor issues in sandbox and tailscale crates

Cargo.toml:
- Add "query" feature to the workspace reqwest dependency, enabling
  reqwest::RequestBuilder::query() for URL query parameter serialization.
  Several connectors need this for API calls with typed query params.

fcp-sandbox/src/egress.rs:
- Minor correctness fix in egress filtering logic

fcp-tailscale/src/identity.rs:
- Fix identity comparison to use correct field reference

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
